title: ProDec Advance 2 Pack 4 inch Flock Mini Paint Rollers for an Ultra-Smooth Finish with Gloss and Satin Paints on Skirting Boards, Window Sills, Panel Doors, Cabinets and Metal, 4"
features: 2x high density foam mini rollers electrostatically coated with a layer of very short flock fibres
Achieves an ultra-smooth, mirror-like sheen with gloss, satin and clear coats that is superior to all other fabrics
Short pile applies a thin, even coat for the ultimate trade quality finish and in less time than other rollers
Ideal for use with both water- and solvent/oil-based paints on smooth surfaces
4" size ideal for skirting boards, window sills, panel doors, metalwork and more
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Is this the right roller for me? In a nutshell Flock is all about the sheen: it gives the highest gloss level of any roller fabric as it leaves no texture in the paint film, enabling it to flow out to a high gloss. Use it on smooth surfaces such as wood and metal and after an undercoat or primer has been applied. Useful to know Ideal for both water- and solvent/oil-based paints and clearcoats. Lint-free so it can be used straight from the bag without pre-washing. What to use and where PAINTS: Gloss, Satin, Clearcoat SURFACES: Wood, Metal FRAME: Fits all standard mini roller frames Flocked foam - get the ultimate finish with gloss paints Used by professionals to achieve the ultimate mirror-smooth finish, especially with high gloss paints, flocked foam rollers use very short flock fibres which are electrostatically coated onto a high density foam body, giving a very short pile roller that leaves no texture in the paint film. This means the paint has much less work to do to flow out to an even, level finish and enabling it to readily achieve its gloss level. This makes flock rollers ideal with gloss, satin and clear coats, giving an ultra-smooth, mirror-like sheen that is superior to all other mini roller fabrics and, because flock lays down a very thin film, the paint requires less working out, enabling you to achieve a trade quality finish in less time than other rollers as well. This pack features 2x 4" mini rollers ideal for use with both water- and solvent/oil-based paints on smooth surfaces such as skirting boards, window sills, panel doors, metalwork and more. Flock rollers are virtually lint-free and require minimal pre-washing before use. Applying Gloss & Satin paints by mini roller ProDec has a choice of trade quality mini roller fabrics to help you achieve a high quality finish with gloss and satin paints. Use this guide to help you make the right choice. Foam Trade grade high density foam with small cells designed to avoid any air pockets, eliminating bubbles in the paint that could otherwise spoil the finish. The foam absorbs paint, releasing it gradually through each roll and giving even surface coverage for less working out and improved efficiency. Mohair High quality, solvent-resistant woven synthetic fabric that is more durable than foam. The pile is cut to 5mm, ensuring the optimum film thickness is applied, giving excellent coverage without the risk of the paint film skinning. Short pile microfibre The softest fabric of all, giving a very light touch and less roller texture in the paint film. Microfibre absorbs the paint inside the fibres, instead of it just sitting between them, meaning that it both loads more smoothly and releases the paint more evenly throughout the stroke, requiring less working out and increasing your painting efficiency. Ensure you select the 6mm short pile, not the 12mm medium pile version. Flocked foam Very short flock fibres which are electrostatically coated onto a high density foam body, giving a very short pile roller that leaves no texture in the paint film. Flock gives the ultimate mirror-smooth finish - ideal for high gloss paints.
